elements.text:
Micro Injection of Trees  is a technology that enables products to be injected into the tree’s vascular system.  

Treatments applied through this route provide effective control of pests and diseases which attack growing shoots, leaves and stem.

 This technique offers the following advantages:
Long lasting effects – 2 to 3 years from a single treatment
Low risk to the tree
Low risk to people, environment and eco-systems
Low risk of  exposure for the operator 
Very low volumes of product required
Easy and fast to administer
Can be applied during windy or rainy weather
A solution which enable infested trees to thrive
